---
title: "Research"
---

## Research interests

My research focuses on three overlapping themes:

- Electoral legitimacy and democratic trust
- Political behavior and public opinion
- Comparative politics and public health risk perception

## Selected areas

- Survey experiments and quantitative analysis
- Election legitimacy and perceptions of fairness
- Political psychology and risk communication
- Applied public policy research

## Recent work

I have worked on projects that examine how individuals evaluate election outcomes, how political perceptions vary across contexts, and how quantitative methods can illuminate these questions.
